title: Bangladesh Declaration on Registration of Company (Form I) (Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms)
description: The Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms' (RJSC) "Form-I: Declaration on Registration of Company", filed under section 25(2) of the Companies Act, 1994, as a statutory precondition to registering a new company in Bangladesh. Opens Bangladesh's Business Formation vertical (5 of 6, alongside the already-published Taxes, DMV, Passport, and Visa verticals). A genuine, static, single-page, print-and-fill specimen (independently confirmed via pdfjs-dist: 1 page, 0 AcroForm/Widget annotations) hosted on RJSC's own rebuilt forms portal (roc.gov.bd), cross-checked word-for-word against a legacy 2003-era HTML mirror of the same form at app.roc.gov.bd. The form is a short declaration, sworn by a person engaged in the company's formation (an advocate/attorney/pleader entitled to appear before the High Court) or by a person named in the company's Articles as a director, manager, or secretary, attesting that every requirement of the Companies Act, 1994 precedent to the company's registration has been complied with, save only payment of the registration fee. The company's proposed name is handwritten twice before the declarant-capacity clause begins — a header line and, in the same unconditional opening sentence, "proposed to be Registered as the ___" — and these two are modeled once, as a single `companyName` field, since both record the same underlying fact ahead of any branching and treating them as two distinct fields would fabricate redundant data the form itself does not distinguish. A third mention, "...as a Director/ Manager/ Secretary of the ___", sits *inside* the declarant-capacity strike-out clause (see next) and is modeled separately, as `declarantCompanyName`, gated `requiredWhen` the officer branch is selected — a filer striking to the Advocate/Attorney/Pleader branch strikes out this entire clause, blank included, so nothing is written there in that case. The declarant's professional/officer capacity is expressed on the source purely through a "Strike out the portion which does not apply" instruction over two either/or option groups (Advocate*/Attorney/A Pleader, or Director/Manager/Secretary) rather than a checkbox or blank; this is modeled as a single closed `declarantCapacity` enum of the six titles offered, the same class of exception this registry already uses for printed-option-list fields with no dedicated widget (e.g. bd/dip's `gender`). The form carries no printed asterisks or other explicit required-field markers anywhere (unlike this registry's bd/dip schemas); `required: true` is applied only to the fields unconditionally essential to any submission of this declaration (company name, declarant's name, declarant's address, declarant's capacity) — this is a disclosed judgment call, detailed in VERIFICATION.md. `Presented for filing by` (the person or firm submitting the filing at RJSC, who is not necessarily the declarant) is modeled as an optional field on the same basis. The form's own closing note ("the declaration need not to be (a) signed before a magistrate or an officer competent to administer oaths, or (b) stamped as an affidavit") is a formality reduction the source itself grants this particular declaration versus an ordinary sworn affidavit; it places no additional requirement on the applicant and is therefore not modeled as a field or document. Companion forms filed as part of the same company-registration package — Form IX (Consent of Director to Act) and Form XII (Particulars of Directors/Manager/Managing Agents) — are hosted via the same RJSC forms portal and object-storage pattern but are out of scope for this v1.0.0; they are flagged as companion-schema candidates for a future cycle in VERIFICATION.md. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Bangladesh or the Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms.

authority.name: Registrar of Joint Stock Companies and Firms

source.documentRef: "Form-I: Declaration on Registration of Company", THE COMPANIES ACT, 1994 (See Section 25), distributed via RJSC's forms portal at https://roc.gov.bd/pages/forms/6922d9b8933eb65569dffa1c

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2687. Opens Bangladesh's Business Formation vertical (5 of 6); Taxes, DMV, Passport, and Visa are already published. Independently re-fetched RJSC's forms-listing page (https://roc.gov.bd/pages/forms/6922d9b8933eb65569dffa1c, HTTP 200, text/html, 110,032 bytes) and the direct PDF (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 83,237 bytes, sha256 de10f506139c9c38984a7f68843eef151647c072e86b2d54b0cbbf8d6deceff7, last-modified Mon, 05 Jan 2026 16:51:06 GMT) via curl -sk with a Chrome-like User-Agent this cycle (the object-storage host, like RJSC's own rebuilt site, fails default TLS certificate verification, the same pattern already seen for BRTA/DIP elsewhere in this registry); the byte size matches the task briefing's own cited figure exactly, independently re-derived. Confirmed, from the listing page's own HTML, that the PDF is linked under the chip label "ফরম-I" ("Form-I"), alongside sibling chips for "ফরম-III", "ফরম-IX", "ফরম-XII", etc. Parsed the downloaded PDF with pdfjs-dist@4 (legacy build): 1 page, 0 AcroForm/Widget annotations (getFieldObjects() returns null; page.getAnnotations() returns an empty array) — a genuine static print-and-fill specimen, not a fillable form, consistent with this registry's existing bd/brta and bd/nbr schemas. getTextContent() returned a full, clean text layer, position-sorted by y/x coordinate to reconstruct reading order. Independently cross-checked this extraction, word for word, against a legacy 2003-era HTML mirror of the same form (https://app.roc.gov.bd/Guidlines/Download/reg_form_i.html, HTTP 200, text/html, 7,590 bytes) — both sources' printed text match exactly, including blank-line lengths and the "* Strike out the portion which does not apply" footnote, corroborating that RJSC's current print-and-fill specimen is textually unchanged from the pre-rebuild-era form. The form's own company-name blank is written by the declarant in two separate places ahead of the declarant-capacity clause (a header line and "...proposed to be Registered as the ___", both unconditional regardless of which capacity branch is later selected); modeled once as `companyName`, not two redundant fields, since both record one fact. A third mention ("...as a Director/Manager/Secretary of the ___") sits inside the declarant-capacity clause's officer branch only and is modeled separately, conditionally (see `declarantCompanyName` below). The declarant's capacity is expressed only via a strike-out instruction over two either/or option groups, with no blank or checkbox of its own; modeled as a single 6-value closed enum (`declarantCapacity`). No printed asterisks or other required-field markers appear anywhere on this one-page form; `required: true` is applied only to the four fields unconditionally essential to any submission of this declaration (`companyName`, `declarantName`, `declarantAddress`, `declarantCapacity`) — a disclosed judgment call, since the source provides no explicit markers to derive requiredness from. `presentedBy` ("Presented for filing by") is modeled as optional: it identifies who is submitting the filing at RJSC, a procedural detail distinct from the substantive declaration itself, and is not repeated or cross-referenced elsewhere on the form the way the four required fields are. The form's closing note that this declaration "need not" be signed before a magistrate or stamped as an affidavit is a formality *reduction* the source grants relative to an ordinary sworn affidavit, not an additional applicant requirement, so it is disclosed in this description rather than modeled as a field or document. The declaration's own attestation language is modeled as a single `documents[]` attestation entry (`declarationAttestation`, `belongsTo: responsible-party`, since the declarant attests on behalf of the company being formed rather than being the applicant themselves). A third mention of the company name, inside the declarant-capacity strike-out clause's officer branch ("...as a Director/Manager/Secretary of the ___"), is modeled as its own conditional field, `declarantCompanyName`, `requiredWhen` `declarantCapacity` is `DIRECTOR`/`MANAGER`/`SECRETARY` — a filer selecting the Advocate/Attorney/Pleader branch instead strikes out that entire clause, blank included. Two hand-authored valid conformance fixtures (0 errors each, one per declarant-capacity branch) plus 6 mutation-control fixtures (each raising exactly 1 error) are committed under conformance/bd/roc/declaration-on-registration-of-company-form-i/1.0.0/. See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record and every scoping/disclosure judgment call.

fields.name: companyName
fields.label: Name of the Company
fields.description: The proposed name of the company being registered. Handwritten by the declarant in two separate places on this one-page form, both ahead of the declarant-capacity strike-out clause (see this schema's own top-level description); modeled once here as a single fact, not two fields. A third, later mention of the company name (inside the strike-out clause) is modeled separately as `declarantCompanyName`, since unlike these two it is conditional on which capacity branch the declarant selects.
fields.sourceRef: Header line: "Name of the Company ________"; also repeated at "...on behalf of a company proposed to be Registered as the ________"

fields.name: presentedBy
fields.label: Presented for filing by
fields.description: The person or firm submitting this filing to RJSC (e.g. the company's promoter, a lawyer, or an authorized filing agent). Not necessarily the same person as the declarant below. No printed asterisk or other required-field marker; modeled as optional (see this schema's top-level description for the disclosed required-field policy).

fields.name: declarantName
fields.label: Declarant's Name
fields.description: The full name of the person making this sworn declaration (an advocate/attorney/pleader engaged in the company's formation, or a person named in the Articles as a director, manager, or secretary — see `declarantCapacity`).
fields.sourceRef: "I, ________ of ________ ... do solemnly and sincerely declare..."

fields.name: declarantAddress
fields.label: Declarant's Address
fields.description: The declarant's address, immediately following their name ("I, [name] of [address]..."). The printed form provides this blank across two lines (a short segment on the same line as the name, continuing onto a full-width blank line below), consistent with accommodating a multi-line postal address; modeled as one field.
fields.sourceRef: "I, ________ of ________" (continues onto the following full-width blank line)

fields.name: declarantCapacity
fields.label: Declarant's Capacity
fields.description: The capacity in which the declarant makes this declaration. The source form expresses this as two either/or option groups joined with "/" and a single "* Strike out the portion which does not apply" instruction, not a checkbox or blank: (1) an Advocate, Attorney, or Pleader entitled to appear before the High Court who is engaged in the formation of the company; or (2) a person named in the company's Articles as a Director, Manager, or Secretary. Modeled as one closed enum of the six titles offered, since the declarant strikes out every option but one, the same class of exception this registry already uses for printed-option-list fields with no dedicated widget (e.g. bd/dip's `gender`).
fields.sourceRef: "...I am an Advocate* / Attorney/ A Pleader entitled to appear before High Court who is engaged in the formation of the company/ a person named in the Articles as a Director/ Manager/ Secretary of the..."; footnote "* Strike out the portion which does not apply"

fields.name: declarantCompanyName
fields.label: Company of which the declarant is Director/Manager/Secretary
fields.description: The company the declarant is named in the Articles as Director/Manager/Secretary of. This blank sits inside the declarant-capacity strike-out clause's officer branch only ("...a person named in the Articles as a Director/Manager/Secretary of the ___"); a declarant who instead selects the Advocate/Attorney/Pleader branch strikes out this entire clause, blank included, so nothing is written here in that case — hence `requiredWhen` rather than an unconditional `required`. In the source PDF this blank is immediately followed by the word "and" twice in succession ("..._____ and and that all the requirements..."); independently confirmed via the extracted text layer to be a verbatim artifact of the source form itself, not a transcription error.
fields.sourceRef: "...a person named in the Articles as a Director/ Manager/ Secretary of the ________________________________________and and that all the requirements..."

documents.label: Declarant's sworn declaration of compliance
documents.statement: I do solemnly and sincerely declare that I am an Advocate/Attorney/A Pleader entitled to appear before High Court who is engaged in the formation of the company, or a person named in the Articles as a Director/Manager/Secretary of the company, and that all the requirements of the Companies Act, 1994 in respect of matters precedent to the registration of the said company and incidental there to have been complied with, save only the payment of the fees and sums payable on registration, and I make the solemn declaration conscientiously believing the same to be true.
documents.sourceRef: Declaration body paragraph, Form-I, THE COMPANIES ACT, 1994 (See Section 25)
